data.title: Live Updates: Latest from Israel, Iran, and the Middle East | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: US will not renew Iranian, Russian oil waivers, Bessent tells AP • War justified by Iran’s 'aggression', says top US lawyer • 'Historic peace' underway with Lebanon, says Netanyahu
